evals.name: status-sync
evals.prompt: 同步状态: US-005 状态已更新为 Done，将此状态同步到 UPM requirements 章节对应条目
expectations: Should update UPM requirements entry status to Done
Should identify the specific UPM entry that was changed
Should record the previous status (In Progress) for audit trail

evals.name: conflict-resolution
evals.prompt: 冲突解决: US-030 在 Git commit 中标记为 Done，但 UPM 中为 In Review，Jira 中为 In Progress — 三方冲突
expectations: Should detect the three-way conflict across sources
Should display all three conflicting status values
Should propose a resolution strategy (e.g., latest-wins or manual review)
